mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medicine_info (elder_id, medicine_name, expiry_date, type, quantity, remark, create_time, update_time,status) VALUES (#{elderId}, #{medicineName}, #{expiryDate}, #{type}, #{quantity}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW(), #{status})
mapper.update: update medicine_info set status = 0, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM medicine_info WHERE id = #{id} and status = 1
SELECT * FROM medicine_info WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} AND status = 1
